subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance of a servant among the servants, that it may draw him unto God, the Lord of the Day of Mutual Summoning. By My life! Whoso heareth My remembrance with an ear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری عبدا من العباد لیجذبه الی الله مالک یوم التناد لعمری من سمع ذکری باذن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @high station of the true believer, @call to action, @chastisement and requital, @idolatry
